atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Injects Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layers into the generated stylesheet.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inlines Tailwind utility classes into a semantic CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Places custom styles into Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @responsive
atDirectives.description: Legacy Tailwind directive for generating responsive variants.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Applies nested rules at a configured Tailwind breakpoint.

atDirectives.name: @variants
atDirectives.description: Legacy Tailwind directive for generating state variants.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Points Tailwind to an alternate configuration file.
